projectDescription: A CMS-driven static website for NJIT's Ying Wu College of Computing Industry Capstone program, where content editors compose pages by stacking reusable UI blocks in Sanity Studio — zero code required.
keyFeatures: CMS-driven page builder with 100+ reusable UI blocks via Sanity Studio
Block registry auto-discovers all blocks — no manual registration
Astro SSG (static site generation) for Lighthouse 95+ performance
Cloudflare Pages + Workers deployment at $0/month operating cost
Sanity Visual Editing with live draft content on preview branch
11 custom blocks with business logic, 102 fulldev/ui template blocks
7 Sanity document types: Page, Sponsor, Project, Team, Event, Submission, Site Settings
Multi-layer testing: Vitest unit + Playwright E2E + axe-core accessibility + Lighthouse CI
Storybook 10 component library with Astro renderer
Automated semantic versioning and changelog via conventional commits
npm workspaces monorepo with astro-app and studio packages
Cloudflare D1 (SQLite) database + Better Auth for student portal
publicApiSurface: block-registry.ts: allBlocks — unified map of all block components
BlockRenderer.astro — single dispatch component for rendering page blocks
defineBlock() — helper for creating Sanity block schemas with shared base fields
getSiteParams() — returns GROQ query params for multi-site filtering
SITE_SETTINGS_QUERY — GROQ query for site-wide settings
PAGE_BY_SLUG_QUERY — GROQ query for fetching pages by slug
ALL_SPONSORS_QUERY — GROQ query for sponsor documents
ALL_PROJECTS_QUERY — GROQ query for project documents
ALL_EVENTS_QUERY — GROQ query for event documents
IMAGE_PROJECTION — reusable GROQ image asset projection
PORTABLE_TEXT_PROJECTION — reusable GROQ portable text projection
Sponsor type — TypeScript type derived from ALL_SPONSORS_QUERY_RESULT
Project type — TypeScript type derived from ALL_PROJECTS_QUERY_RESULT
Testimonial type — TypeScript type derived from ALL_TESTIMONIALS_QUERY_RESULT
